rationale: Both correctly land on the ground-truth root cause (no chunks actually dropped; talker YAML temperature=0.9 vs. request temperature=0 explains the audio-length variance) and both cite specific code paths, so correctness and grounding are close, with X's line-ranged multi-file transport audit arguably even more rigorous. But X is framed as an internal audit/addendum auditing another agent's claims rather than a reporter-facing reply, and offers no actionable next step beyond folding hardening into #4872. Y reads as an actual postable maintainer answer — addresses the reporter directly, cites the YAML and stage-processor code, gives a concrete workaround (pin talker temp to 0), references #4872, and states a clear disposition — making it more complete end-to-end.
